description: Up to 6 city dots on a world map, each with a leader line to a stat callout card. Best for comparing multiple cities or countries — rankings, incident counts, economic figures, attack volumes.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Headline, e.g. 'TOP CITIES BY CYBER INCIDENTS' or 'GLOBAL DEBT EXPOSURE'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Summary line at bottom, e.g. 'Data represents Q1 2025 figures'
